CustomField.formula:
IF( HOMEtracker__Total_Pretax_Income_This_Year__c = 0, "INC=0 ", IF(HOMEtracker__Total_Pretax_Income_This_Year__c - Pre_Applicant__r.Annual_Income__c > 200, "$INC ", "")) & IF( HOMEtracker__Household_Size__c = VALUE(TEXT(Pre_Applicant__r.Household_Size__c)),"","HH# " )
&IF( TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property__r.Age_Restriction__c )= "none", "", "AGE ") &IF( AND(App_or_CoApp_in_Region__c = "??", TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property__r.Listing_Stage__c) = "Region and bedroom/household size restricted"), "REG","")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comparison of Pre-Applicant information to public house submitted info.
CustomField.label: Pre-App to Full App Changes
